title: DonutSMP Balances
description:
This Mod adds balances and playtime above players on the DonutSMP

You must use your Donut SMP api key for this to work.
body:
This mod allows players to show balances and play time of other players on the donut smp.

When you have the mod installed, join the DonutSMP and type /api and copy the code given. Go into your mod menu settings and find DonutSMP Balance and click on the icon to go into the settings, then click api at the top and put in your code the server gave you and save and quit.

Enjoy!

/Pay Diny  (tip me pls)
